Motion To Change Venue Memorandum Of Points And Authorities Declaration Of Sara M Knowles Declaration Of Mitchell Dee Chapman Request For Sanctions Rule 4 15 B Ccp 396b 397
Off Calendar Mar-26-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. SARA KNOWLES, Esq. (tel: 530-425-4001) for Defendant Mitchell Dee Chapman.
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing RE: DEFENDANT MITCHELL CHAPMAN's Motion To Change Venue.

Matter not argued/contested. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant's motion to change venue to Butte County Superior Court is granted.

It is undisputed that plaintiff's injuries occurred in Butte County, and defendant resides there. (CCP 395(a); Mitchell Dec. 6:16-7:9.) No nexus to San Francisco exists. Plaintiff says she had difficulty finding defendant to serve him and relies on another part of CCP 395(a) which says "an action may be tried in any county" if defendant's county of residence "is unknown." But this case is in the pleading stage, a long way from trial, and defendant's residence is known.

No sanctions are awarded; plaintiff shall pay the court transfer fees.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)

Atty. SARA KNOWLES, Esq. (tel: 530-425-4001) for Defendant Mitchel Dee Chapman.
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT MITCHELL CHAPMAN's DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

Matter not argued/contested. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant's demurrer is moot in this court, because the case has been transferred to Butte County Superior Court.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
